infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The Reinvention Edit uses the camera so you can take or update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: The Reinvention Edit exports your roadmap tasks to your calendar to help you stay on schedule.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The Reinvention Edit needs photo library access so you can upload a profile picture or inspiration images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: The Reinvention Edit may save images to your photo library when you export or share your plans or reflections.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: The Reinvention Edit sends reminders to help you stay consistent with your roadmap tasks.
